headline: Aon's $5 Billion Insurance Expansion Targets the Exploding AI Data Center Market
summary: AON stock edges higher in premarket trading as Aon expands its Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program capacity to a massive $5B.

raw.headline: Aon's $5 Billion Insurance Expansion Targets the Exploding AI Data Center Market
raw.summary: AON stock edges higher in premarket trading as Aon expands its Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program capacity to a massive $5B.

headline: Aon expands Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program to $5 billion with Reliable by Design Approach to Digital Infrastructure
summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, today announced the next evolution of its proprietary Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program (DCLP), expanding program capacity to $5 billion while broadening the integrated risk solutions that support digital infrastructure assets from development through long-term operations.
